info.description: Agromart B2B agricultural marketplace backend server.
info.title: Agromart API

delete.description: Deletes the admin with the given ID

get.description: Returns the details of the admin with the given ID

post.description: Authenticates an admin using email and password and returns a JWT token

put.description: Updates the profile details of the admin with the given ID
Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload a profile image for the given admin
put.summary: Generates presigned URL for admin profile image upload and updates the image path in database

put.description: Updates the password of the admin with the given ID
Marks the business application for the given ID as accepted

post.description: Submits an application for business approval

get.description: Returns the application status and details for the business with the given ID

put.description: Marks the business application for the given ID as rejected with a reason

post.description: Creates a new business profile for a user

delete.description: Deletes the business with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all registered businesses
Returns full business profile including social, legal, and application details
Returns the business ID associated with the given user ID
get.summary: Get business ID by user ID

get.description: Returns the basic profile of the business with the given ID

post.description: Creates legal document records for the given business

get.description: Returns the legal documents for the business with the given ID

put.description: Updates the legal document records for the business with the given ID

post.description: Submits or updates a rating for a business by a user (upsert)

get.description: Returns the average rating for the business with the given ID
Returns a list of all user ratings for the given business

post.description: Creates a new written review for a business

delete.description: Deletes the business review with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of reviews for the business with the given ID

put.description: Updates the review text of the business review with the given ID

post.description: Creates social media links for the given business

get.description: Returns the social media links for the business with the given ID

put.description: Updates the social media links for the business with the given ID
Sets the blocked status of the business with the given ID
Sets the trusted status of the business with the given ID
Sets the verified status of the business with the given ID

get.description: Returns whether the business with the given ID has been approved

put.description: Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload a profile image for the given business
put.summary: Generate presigned URL for business profile image upload and updates the image path in database

put.description: Updates the profile details of the business with the given ID

delete.description: Deletes the category with the given ID

get.description: Returns a list of all product categories
Returns the category with the given ID

post.description: Creates a new sub-category under an existing category

delete.description: Deletes the sub-category with the given ID

get.description: Returns a list of all sub-categories across all categories
Returns all sub-categories belonging to the given category
Returns the sub-category with the given ID

put.description: Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload an image for the given sub-category
put.summary: Generate presigned URL for sub-category image upload and updates the image path in database

put.description: Updates the name and description of the sub-category with the given ID
Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload an image for the given category
put.summary: Generate presigned URL for category image upload and updates the image path in database

put.description: Updates the name and description of the category with the given ID

get.description: Returns all messages exchanged between two users, ordered oldest to newest

put.description: Marks all unread messages from sender_id to receiver_id as read

post.description: Sends a text message from one user to another and persists it in the database

201.description: Saved message with id and created_at

get.description: Upgrades the connection to WebSocket. Pass ?user_id=<uuid>. Send JSON {"receiver_id":"...","content":"..."}; receive JSON Message objects in real-time.

post.description: Creates a follower relationship between a user and a business (idempotent)

get.description: Returns the total number of followers for a given business
Returns a paginated list of all users following the given business
Returns the total number of businesses a user is following
Returns a paginated list of all businesses a user is following

post.description: Removes the follower relationship between a user and a business
Creates a new product listing for a business

delete.description: Returns success message after successfully deleting image from both S3 and database
delete.summary: Delete's the Product Image from S3 and image path from database

delete.description: Deletes the product with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of active products. Supports optional name search and location filters.
Returns a paginated list of products for the given business ID
Returns a paginated list of active products in the given category
Returns a paginated list of active products from all businesses the user follows
Returns a paginated list of active products in the given sub-category
Returns full product details including business, category, and image info

post.description: Submits or updates a rating for a product by a user (upsert). Rating must be between 0.5 and 5.0.

get.description: Returns the average rating for the product with the given ID

delete.description: Deletes the product rating with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of ratings for the product with the given ID

post.description: Creates a new written review for a product

delete.description: Deletes the product review with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of reviews for the product with the given ID

put.description: Updates the review text of the product review with the given ID
Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload an image for the given product
put.summary: Generate presigned URL for product image upload and updates the image path in database

patch.description: Activates or deactivates the product with the given ID

put.description: Updates the details of the product with the given ID

post.description: Creates a new Request for Quotation for a business

delete.description: Deletes the RFQ with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all RFQs across all businesses. Supports optional search and location filters.
Returns a paginated list of RFQs belonging to the given business

put.description: Toggles the active status of an RFQ by its ID
Updates the details of an existing RFQ by its ID
Updates the block status of the user with the given ID

delete.description: Deletes the user with the given ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all registered users
Returns the details of the user with the given ID

post.description: Authenticates a user using email and password and returns a JWT token with business context

put.description: Updates the profile details of the user with the given ID
Returns an S3 presigned URL to upload a profile image for the given user
put.summary: Generate presigned URL for user profile image upload and updates the image path in database

put.description: Updates the password of the user with the given ID

description.example: All types of grains and cereals
All types of grains and cereals
